attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
INV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
,INV.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,INV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,INV.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,INV.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,INV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,INV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
,INV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
,INV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,INV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,INV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,INV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,INV.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    
,INV.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,INV.SALES_REP_NUMBER              
,INV.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
,INV.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  
,INV.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       
,INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,INV.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    
,INV.DD_GL_DATETIME                
,INV.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        
,INV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME            
,INV.DV_FISCAL_DT                  
,INV.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
,INV.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD          
,INV.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD 
,INV.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD            
,INV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD       
,INV.AR_TRX_DATETIME               
,INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
,INV.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         
,INV.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      
,INV.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             
,INV.DV_CHARGES_FLG                
,INV.DV_MISC_FLG                   
,INV.DV_SERVICE_FLG                
,INV.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     
,INV.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       
,INV.DV_REVENUE_FLG                
,INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      
,INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
,INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM
,INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       
,INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      
,INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        
,INV.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     
,INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     
,INV.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
,INV.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY           
,INV.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY         
,USER
,Current_Timestamp(0)
,USER
,Current_Timestamp(0)         
,INV.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         
,INV.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD    
,INV.GL_DT                         
,INV.BK_SS_CD                      
,INV.DV_EXTENDED_QTY               
,INV.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     
,INV.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  
,INV.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        
,INV.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              
,INV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  
,INV.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   
,INV.TRANSACTION_DT                
,INV.GL_POSTED_DTM                 
,INV.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
,INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT    
,INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT    
,INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT      
,INV.SPLIT_PCT                     
,INV.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,INV.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE           
,INV.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG       
,INV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
,INV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
,INV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,INV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
,INV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,INV.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID                
,INV.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD           
,INV.DV_FMV_FLG                    
,INV.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     
,INV.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT        
,INV.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT   
,INV.BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT     
,INV.DSV_FLG                       
,INV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            
,INV.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,INV.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME          
,INV.XCAT_FLG                      
,INV.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
,INV.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
,INV.ELA_FLG                       
,INV.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY
,INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT   
,INV.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         
,INV.POB_TYPE_CD                   
,INV.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG            
,INV.DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG   
,INV.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD               
,INV.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY           
,INV.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY            
,'Y' LAST_RECORD_FLG             
,-999 PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT    
,INV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
,INV.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE INV
/*INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EL
ON EL.FISCAL_ID = INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT*/
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV  DRVD
ON DRVD.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY = INV. REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND DRVD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT   = INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND DRVD.LAST_RECORD_FLG='Y'
WHERE INV.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME > '$$LastExtractDate'
AND INV.GL_DT >= CAST ('2019-05-26' AS DATE)
--AND INV.GL_DT  BETWEEN EL.START_DATE AND EL.END_DATE
AND INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('AR')  
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_MEASURE_SMR_INCR OM_INCR
WHERE OM_INCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = INV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND OM_INCR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND OM_INCR.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD )

AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_MSR_SMR_INCR_XAAS XAAS_INCR
WHERE XAAS_INCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = INV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND XAAS_INCR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND XAAS_INCR.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD )

UNION ALL

SELECT
INV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
,INV.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,INV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,INV.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,INV.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,INV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,INV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
,INV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
,INV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,INV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,INV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,INV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,INV.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    
,INV.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,INV.SALES_REP_NUMBER              
,INV.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
,INV.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  
,INV.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       
,INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,INV.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    
,INV.DD_GL_DATETIME                
,INV.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        
,INV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME            
,INV.DV_FISCAL_DT                  
,INV.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
,INV.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD          
,INV.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD 
,INV.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD            
,INV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD       
,INV.AR_TRX_DATETIME               
,INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
,INV.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         
,INV.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      
,INV.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             
,INV.DV_CHARGES_FLG                
,INV.DV_MISC_FLG                   
,INV.DV_SERVICE_FLG                
,INV.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     
,INV.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       
,INV.DV_REVENUE_FLG                
,INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      
,INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
,INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM
,INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       
,INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      
,INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        
,INV.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     
,INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     
,INV.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
,INV.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY           
,INV.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY         
,USER
,Current_Timestamp(0)
,USER
,Current_Timestamp(0)         
,INV.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         
,INV.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD    
,INV.GL_DT                         
,INV.BK_SS_CD                      
,INV.DV_EXTENDED_QTY               
,INV.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     
,INV.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  
,INV.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        
,INV.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              
,INV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  
,INV.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   
,INV.TRANSACTION_DT                
,INV.GL_POSTED_DTM                 
,INV.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
,INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT    
,INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT    
,INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT      
,INV.SPLIT_PCT                     
,INV.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,INV.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE           
,INV.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG       
,INV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
,INV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
,INV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,INV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
,INV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,INV.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID                
,INV.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD           
,INV.DV_FMV_FLG                    
,INV.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     
,INV.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT        
,INV.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT   
,INV.BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT     
,INV.DSV_FLG                       
,INV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            
,INV.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,INV.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME          
,INV.XCAT_FLG                      
,INV.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
,INV.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
,INV.ELA_FLG                       
,INV.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY
,INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT   
,INV.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         
,INV.POB_TYPE_CD                   
,INV.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG            
,INV.DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG   
,INV.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD               
,INV.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY           
,INV.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY            
,'Y' LAST_RECORD_FLG             
,-999 PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT    
,INV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
,INV.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE INV
/*INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EL
ON EL.FISCAL_ID = INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT*/
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_RV_OOD  DRVD
ON DRVD.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY = INV. REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND DRVD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT   = INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND DRVD.LAST_RECORD_FLG='Y'
WHERE INV.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME > '$$LastExtractDate'
AND INV.GL_DT >= Cast ('2019-05-26 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))
--AND INV.GL_DT  BETWEEN EL.START_DATE AND EL.END_DATE
AND INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('AR-OOD')  
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_MEASURE_SMR_INCR OM_INCR
WHERE OM_INCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = INV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND OM_INCR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND OM_INCR.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD )

AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_MSR_SMR_INCR_XAAS XAAS_INCR
WHERE XAAS_INCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = INV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND XAAS_INCR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND XAAS_INCR.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD )

SELECT	 INV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY            ,INV.SALES_ORDER_KEY                ,
			INV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY           ,Coalesce(ORDERED_PRODUCT_KEY,
			INV.PRODUCT_KEY)AS PRODUCT_KEY ,INV.AR_TRX_KEY                     ,
			INV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY                ,INV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY  ,
			INV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY               ,INV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,
			INV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,INV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,
			INV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY            ,INV.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY     ,
			INV.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY     ,INV.SALES_REP_NUMBER                 ,
			INV.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT      ,INV.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT   ,
			INV.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT        ,INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  ,
			INV.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD     ,INV.DD_GL_DATETIME                 ,
			INV.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD         ,INV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME             ,
			INV.DV_FISCAL_DT                   ,INV.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD      ,
			INV.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD           ,INV.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD  ,
			INV.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD             ,INV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD    ,
			INV.AR_TRX_DATETIME                ,INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD      ,
			INV.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD          ,INV.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG       ,
			INV.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG              ,INV.DV_CHARGES_FLG                 ,
			INV.DV_MISC_FLG                    ,INV.DV_SERVICE_FLG                 ,
			INV.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG      ,INV.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG        ,
			INV.DV_REVENUE_FLG                 ,(
			CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT *-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT END  /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
		ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
			(
		CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT END  /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
			(
		CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM*-1  
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM END /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1) AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM ,
			(
		CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT END        /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ,
			(
		CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT END       /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1) AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT ,
			(
		CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT END         /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT ,
			(
		CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT END      /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1) AS DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT ,
			(
		CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT END      /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1)  AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT ,
			(
		CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT END  /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1)  AS DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
			CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY*-1 
				ELSE INV.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY 
			END  AS DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY ,
			CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY*-1 
				ELSE INV.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY 
			END  AS DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY ,
		USER ,Current_Timestamp(0) ,USER ,
			Current_Timestamp(0) ,INV.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD          ,
		INV.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD     ,
			INV.GL_DT                          ,
		INV.BK_SS_CD                       ,
			CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_EXTENDED_QTY *-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_EXTENDED_QTY 
			END    AS DV_EXTENDED_QTY  ,
		(
			CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT*-1  
				ELSE INV.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT END      /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1)  ,(
			CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT END   /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1)  ,INV.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD         ,
			INV.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD               ,INV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD   ,
			INV.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY    ,INV.TRANSACTION_DT                 ,
			INV.GL_POSTED_DTM                  ,INV.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY ,
			(
		CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT END     /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1)  AS DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
			(
		CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT END     /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1) AS DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT ,
			(
		CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT END       /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1) AS DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT --,(CASE WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN SPLIT_PCT*-1 ELSE SPLIT_PCT END      /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1)    AS SPLIT_PCT
	--,( INV.SPLIT_PCT       /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1)    AS SPLIT_PCT
	--,CASE WHEN CAL.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT IS NOT NULL AND OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'ATTRIBUTED' THEN 100 ELSE INV.SPLIT_PCT END AS SPLIT_PCT
	--,CASE WHEN CAL.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT IS NOT NULL AND OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'ATTRIBUTED' THEN (INV.SPLIT_PCT/INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT)*INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT ELSE INV.SPLIT_PCT END AS DV_SPLIT_PCT
	,
			INV.SPLIT_PCT AS SPLIT_PCT ,INV.BK_COMPANY_CODE                ,
			INV.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE            ,INV.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG        ,
			INV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY           ,INV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY        ,
			Coalesce(OA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,INV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ) AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
			INV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                 ,Coalesce(OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD,
			INV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD) AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD              ,
		INV.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID                 ,
			INV.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD            ,
		INV.DV_FMV_FLG                     ,
			INV.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD      ,
		(
			CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT*-1  
				ELSE INV.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT END         /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1)  AS DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT ,
			(
		CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT END    /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1)  AS DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT ,
			INV.BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT      ,INV.DSV_FLG                        ,
			INV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY             ,INV.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY ,
			INV.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME           ,INV.XCAT_FLG                       ,
			INV.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME             ,INV.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG            ,
			INV.ELA_FLG                        ,INV.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY ,
			(
		CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT END    /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1)  AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT ,
			Cast(  Trim(Coalesce((
			CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED',
		'BIB','BIB OFFSET') THEN OA.ORDERED_PRODUCT_KEY 
				ELSE INV.PRODUCT_KEY END) ,
		-9999  )) || '~' ||  Trim(INV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY) || '~' ||     Trim(INV.SALES_ORDER_KEY) ||  '~' ||     Trim(Coalesce(OA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
			INV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999)                ) AS VARCHAR(70))   AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD ,
			INV.POB_TYPE_CD                    ,INV.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG             ,
			INV.DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG    ,INV.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD                ,
			INV.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY            ,INV.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY             ,
			'Y' LATEST_RECORD_FLG              ,INV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   AS parent_OA_ID ,
			INV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY ,INV.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME 
	FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE INV 
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EL 
		ON EL.FISCAL_ID = INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV  DRVD 
		ON DRVD.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY = INV. REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY 
		AND DRVD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT   = INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
		AND DRVD.LAST_RECORD_FLG='Y' 
	INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL 
		ON SOL. SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=INV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
		AND SOL.SS_CODE  IN 'OPL' -- to qualify only XAAS/OPL orders
	/*
	LEFT JOIN ( 
			SEL	 DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT,
			SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY 
			FROM	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX TRX  
			WHERE	EXISTS ( 
					SEL	1 
					FROM	 $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ATRB_NG_NRT OA 
					WHERE	 TRX.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY   =OA.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY 
						AND OA.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY>0 ) 
				AND DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT>0 
			QUALIFY	Row_Number() Over(
			PARTITION BY DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT 
			ORDER BY SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY DESC)=1 ) TRX 
		ON  Cast(SOL.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)=Cast(TRX.DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT AS BIGINT)  
	LEFT  JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ATRB_NG_NRT OA 
		ON OA.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY=TRX.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY 
		AND 
			CASE 
				WHEN PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT<0 THEN OA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
				ELSE PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT END = INV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
		AND OA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT>0 
		AND OA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT<>0 
		AND  NOT EXISTS ( 
			SEL	1 
			FROM	 $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ATRB_NG_NRT OA1 
			WHERE	OA.PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT=OA1.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
				AND OA1.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'OFFSET') 
	LEFT JOIN ( 
			SEL	BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
			Sum(ATTRIBUTION_PCT) AS TOT_PCT 
			FROM	$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ATRB_NG_NRT   
			WHERE	ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB'  
				AND BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT >0  
			GROUP BY 1  
			HAVING	TOT_PCT >0) CAL  
		ON CAl.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=OA.PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT */
		
		LEFT JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_XAAS_SO_SBSCRPTN_ATTRBTN_SMR OA
 ON OA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY= INV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND CASE WHEN OA.PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT<0 THEN OA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ELSE
OA.PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT END = INV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
AND OA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0
AND  INV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT>0
AND OA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT <> 0
AND  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM   $$STGDB.WI_XAAS_SO_SBSCRPTN_ATTRBTN_SMR  OA1
WHERE OA.PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT=OA1.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AND OA1.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'OFFSET')

LEFT JOIN ( SEL
BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
Sum(ATTRIBUTION_PCT) AS TOT_PCT
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_XAAS_SO_SBSCRPTN_ATTRBTN_SMR  
 WHERE ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB'
 AND BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT >0
 GROUP BY 1
 HAVING TOT_PCT >0) CAL
 ON CAl.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=OA.PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT
 
 
	WHERE	 INV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  
		AND INV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY < 0   
		AND INV.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME > '$$LastExtractDate'    
		AND INV.GL_DT >= Cast ('2019-05-26' AS DATE)   
		AND INV.GL_DT  BETWEEN EL.START_DATE 
		AND EL.END_DATE   
		AND INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('AR')      
		AND NOT EXISTS (  
			SELECT	1 
			FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_INV_REV_MEASURE MT 
			WHERE	MT.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD 
				AND MT.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY > 0 
				AND MT.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = INV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY  
				AND MT.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = INV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY		
	GROUP BY 1	)  
		AND NOT EXISTS( 
			SELECT	1 
			FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_INV_REV_MEASURE MT1 
			WHERE	MT1.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD 
				AND MT1.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY > 0 
				AND MT1.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY = INV.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY 
	GROUP BY 1)  
		AND NOT EXISTS( 
			SELECT	1 
			FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_INV_REV_MEASURE MT2 
			WHERE	MT2.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD 
				AND MT2.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY > 0 
				AND MT2.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = INV.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY 
	GROUP BY 1)  
		AND NOT EXISTS( 
			SELECT	1 
			FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_INV_REV_MEASURE MT4 
			WHERE	MT4.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD 
				AND MT4.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY > 0 
				AND MT4.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY = INV.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY 
	GROUP BY 1)  
		AND NOT EXISTS( 
			SELECT	1 
			FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_INV_REV_MEASURE MT5 
			WHERE	MT5.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD 
				AND MT5.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY > 0 
				AND MT5.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY = INV.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY 
	GROUP BY 1)  
		AND NOT EXISTS( 
			SELECT	1 
			FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_INV_REV_MEASURE MT6 
			WHERE	MT6.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD 
				AND MT6.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY > 0 
				AND MT6.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY = INV.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY 
	GROUP BY 1 )  
		AND NOT EXISTS( 
			SELECT	1 
			FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_INV_REV_MEASURE MT7 
			WHERE	MT7.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD 
				AND MT7.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY > 0 
				AND MT7.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY = INV.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY 
	GROUP BY 1)

SELECT	 INV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY            ,INV.SALES_ORDER_KEY                ,
			INV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY           ,Coalesce(ORDERED_PRODUCT_KEY,
			INV.PRODUCT_KEY)AS PRODUCT_KEY ,INV.AR_TRX_KEY                     ,
			INV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY                ,INV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY  ,
			INV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY               ,INV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,
			INV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,INV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,
			INV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY            ,INV.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY     ,
			INV.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY     ,INV.SALES_REP_NUMBER                 ,
			INV.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT      ,INV.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT   ,
			INV.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT        ,INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  ,
			INV.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD     ,INV.DD_GL_DATETIME                 ,
			INV.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD         ,INV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME             ,
			INV.DV_FISCAL_DT                   ,INV.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD      ,
			INV.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD           ,INV.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD  ,
			INV.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD             ,INV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD    ,
			INV.AR_TRX_DATETIME                ,INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD      ,
			INV.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD          ,INV.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG       ,
			INV.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG              ,INV.DV_CHARGES_FLG                 ,
			INV.DV_MISC_FLG                    ,INV.DV_SERVICE_FLG                 ,
			INV.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG      ,INV.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG        ,
			INV.DV_REVENUE_FLG                 ,(
			CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT *-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT END  /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
			(CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT END  /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
			(CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM*-1  
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM END /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1) AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM ,
			(CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT END        /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ,
			(CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT END       /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1) AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT ,
			(CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT END         /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT ,
			(CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT END      /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1) AS DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT ,
			(CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT END      /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1)  AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT ,
			(CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT END  /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1)  AS DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
			CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY*-1 
				ELSE INV.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY 
			END  AS DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY ,
			CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY*-1 
				ELSE INV.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY 
			END  AS DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY ,USER ,Current_Timestamp(0) ,USER ,
			Current_Timestamp(0) ,INV.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD          ,INV.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD     ,
			INV.GL_DT                          ,INV.BK_SS_CD                       ,
			CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_EXTENDED_QTY *-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_EXTENDED_QTY 
			END    AS DV_EXTENDED_QTY  ,(
			CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT*-1  
				ELSE INV.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT END      /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1)  ,(
			CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT END   /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1)  ,INV.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD         ,
			INV.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD               ,INV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD   ,
			INV.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY    ,INV.TRANSACTION_DT                 ,
			INV.GL_POSTED_DTM                  ,INV.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY ,
			(CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT END     /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1)  AS DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
			(CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT END     /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1) AS DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT ,
			(CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT END       /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1) AS DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT --,(CASE WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN SPLIT_PCT*-1 ELSE SPLIT_PCT END      /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1)    AS SPLIT_PCT
	--,( INV.SPLIT_PCT       /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1)    AS SPLIT_PCT
	--,CASE WHEN CAL.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT IS NOT NULL AND OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'ATTRIBUTED' THEN 100 ELSE INV.SPLIT_PCT END AS SPLIT_PCT
	,
			INV.SPLIT_PCT AS SPLIT_PCT ,INV.BK_COMPANY_CODE                ,
			INV.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE            ,INV.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG        ,
			INV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY           ,INV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY        ,
			Coalesce(OA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,INV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ) AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
			INV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                 ,Coalesce(OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD,
			INV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD) AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD              ,INV.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID                 ,
			INV.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD            ,INV.DV_FMV_FLG                     ,
			INV.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD      ,(
			CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT*-1  
				ELSE INV.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT END         /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1)  AS DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT ,
			(CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT END    /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1)  AS DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT ,
			INV.BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT      ,INV.DSV_FLG                        ,
			INV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY             ,INV.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY ,
			INV.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME           ,INV.XCAT_FLG                       ,
			INV.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME             ,INV.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG            ,
			INV.ELA_FLG                        ,INV.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY ,
			(CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB OFFSET' THEN INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT*-1 
				ELSE INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT END    /Coalesce(TOT_PCT,
			ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1))*Coalesce(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,1)  AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT ,
			Cast(  Trim(Coalesce((
			CASE 
				WHEN OA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB','BIB OFFSET') THEN OA.ORDERED_PRODUCT_KEY 
				ELSE INV.PRODUCT_KEY END) , -9999  )) || '~' ||  Trim(INV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY) || '~' ||     Trim(INV.SALES_ORDER_KEY) ||  '~' ||     Trim(Coalesce(OA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
			INV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999)                ) AS VARCHAR(70))   AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD ,
			INV.POB_TYPE_CD                    ,INV.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG             ,
			INV.DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG    ,INV.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD                ,
			INV.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY            ,INV.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY             ,
			'Y' LATEST_RECORD_FLG              ,INV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   AS parent_OA_ID ,
			INV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY ,INV.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME 
	FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE INV 
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EL 
		ON EL.FISCAL_ID = INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV  DRVD 
		ON DRVD.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY = INV. REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY 
		AND DRVD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT   = INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
		AND DRVD.LAST_RECORD_FLG='Y' --AND DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT =201903 --196062
	INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL 
		ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = INV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
		AND INV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY > 0 
		AND INV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY < 0  
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT         
		ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY         
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS         
		ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY    
		AND ( BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX', 'WEBEX',	'ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','CSP-MARKETPLACE')  
		OR  (BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY  ('XAAS%', 'ICMS-XAAS%','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD')   	/* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
		OR (BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') 	AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS') )  	
		OR (BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS'))/*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
		) )   
/*	LEFT JOIN ( 
		SEL	 DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT,SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY 
		FROM	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX TRX  
		WHERE	EXISTS ( 
			SEL	1 
			FROM	 $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ATRB_NG_NRT OA 
			WHERE	 TRX.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY   =OA.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY 
				AND OA.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY>0 GROUP BY 1 ) 
			AND DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT>0 
		QUALIFY	Row_Number() Over(
		PARTITION BY DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT 
		ORDER BY SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY DESC)=1 ) TRX 
		ON  Cast(NATL.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT AS BIGINT)=Cast(TRX.DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT AS BIGINT)   
	LEFT  JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ATRB_NG_NRT     OA 
		ON OA.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY=TRX.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY 
		AND 
			CASE 
				WHEN PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT<0 THEN OA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
				ELSE PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT END = INV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
		AND OA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT>0 
		AND OA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT<>0 
		AND  NOT EXISTS ( 
		SEL	1 
		FROM	 $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ATRB_NG_NRT OA1 
		WHERE	OA.PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT=OA1.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
			AND OA1.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'OFFSET' GROUP BY 1) 
	LEFT JOIN ( 
		SEL	BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, Sum(ATTRIBUTION_PCT) AS TOT_PCT 
		FROM	$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ATRB_NG_NRT   
		WHERE	ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB'  
			AND BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT >0  
		GROUP BY 1  
		HAVING	TOT_PCT >0) CAL  
		ON CAl.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=OA.PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT */
		
LEFT JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_XAAS_SO_SBSCRPTN_ATTRBTN_SMR OA
 ON OA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY= INV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND CASE WHEN OA.PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT<0 THEN OA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ELSE
OA.PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT END = INV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
AND OA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0
AND  INV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT>0
AND OA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT <> 0
AND  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM   $$STGDB.WI_XAAS_SO_SBSCRPTN_ATTRBTN_SMR  OA1
WHERE OA.PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT=OA1.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AND OA1.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'OFFSET')

LEFT JOIN ( SEL
BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
Sum(ATTRIBUTION_PCT) AS TOT_PCT
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_XAAS_SO_SBSCRPTN_ATTRBTN_SMR  
 WHERE ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'BIB'
 AND BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT >0
 GROUP BY 1
 HAVING TOT_PCT >0) CAL
 ON CAl.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=OA.PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT
 
	WHERE	 INV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY >0  
		AND INV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY < 0   
		AND INV.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME > '$$LastExtractDate'   
		AND INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('AR')      
		AND INV.GL_DT >= Cast ('2019-05-26' AS DATE)  
		AND INV.GL_DT  BETWEEN EL.START_DATE 
		AND EL.END_DATE       
		AND NOT EXISTS ( 
		SELECT	1 
		FROM	$$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_MSR_SMR_INCR_XAAS WI 
		WHERE	WI.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = INV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY 
			AND WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  
			AND WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  GROUP BY 1)     
		AND NOT EXISTS ( 
		SELECT	1  
		FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_INV_REV_MEASURE MT 
		WHERE	MT.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD 
			AND MT.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY > 0 
			AND MT.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = INV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
			AND MT.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = INV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY		GROUP BY 1	 )  
		AND NOT EXISTS( 
		SELECT	1 
		FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_INV_REV_MEASURE MT1 
		WHERE	MT1.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD 
			AND MT1.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY > 0 
			AND MT1.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY = INV.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY GROUP BY 1 )  
		AND NOT EXISTS( 
		SELECT	1 
		FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_INV_REV_MEASURE MT2 
		WHERE	MT2.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD 
			AND MT2.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY > 0 
			AND MT2.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = INV.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY GROUP BY 1 )   
		AND NOT EXISTS( 
		SELECT	1 
		FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_INV_REV_MEASURE MT4 
		WHERE	MT4.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD 
			AND MT4.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY > 0 
			AND MT4.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY = INV.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY GROUP BY 1 )  
		AND NOT EXISTS( 
		SELECT	1 
		FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_INV_REV_MEASURE MT5 
		WHERE	MT5.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD 
			AND MT5.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY > 0 
			AND MT5.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY = INV.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY GROUP BY 1)  
		AND NOT EXISTS( 
		SELECT	1 
		FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_INV_REV_MEASURE MT6 
		WHERE	MT6.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD 
			AND MT6.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY > 0 
			AND MT6.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY = INV.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY GROUP BY 1 )  
		AND NOT EXISTS( 
		SELECT	1 
		FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_INV_REV_MEASURE MT7 
		WHERE	MT7.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD 
			AND MT7.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY > 0 
			AND MT7.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY = INV.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY GROUP BY 1)
